name: West Haven Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Over the dates, pour hot water mixed with soda.
2. Let cool completely.
3. Cream together sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add dates and salt to the creamed mixture.
5. Add eggs, vanilla, and flour sifted with cocoa, mixing until just combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan (inches).
7. Sprinkle pecans and chocolate chips evenly over the dough in the pan.
8. Bake for 40 minutes at a moderate temperature of 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Serve with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired.
